category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a cross-platform hot compilation tool for Go; official GitHub README says it monitors project files and automatically triggers recompilation and running.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is hotbuild; official GitHub repository and README use “hotbuild”.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides install, initialization, run, and configuration documentation; source_facts.homepage points to the official project site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/wandercn/hotbuild; repo not re-evaluated per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README topics include go, builder, tools, live-reload, build-tool, hot-reload, watcher, and hot-compilation-tool; source_facts.executables lists hotbuild.
